name: Black Bean Relish
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup black beans, cooked and drained
1/3 cup red bell peppers, diced finely
2 dashes tabasco sauce or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and core the red bell peppers.
2. Dice the bell peppers into small pieces.
3. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
4. Stir the mixture until well combined.
5. Allow the relish to sit for 1 hour before serving.
